title: Embracing Weird Code
description:
How often have you seen a piece of code that is just *weird*? The longer you stare at it, the more cryptic it becomes? And when you think you finally got it, you discover something that stumps you again?

Every line of code tells a story. As hard as it might be to believe when looking at it, someone, at some point, considered it the best way to solve *something*. (Just wait until you realize it was actually you, just a couple months ago.)

Join me on this journey through weird code, challenging your expectations, and dealing with ambiguity.
